title: The Multifaceted Value of Freedom in Sociopolitical Contexts
content: Freedomis one of those words everyone uses but few define the same way. Is it the absence of rules? The right to do whatever you want? Or something far deeper - the ability to truly govern yourself, develop your potential, and participate meaningfully insociety? Two of sociology's founding thinkers, Karl Marx and Émile Durkheim, rejected the shallow, transactional view offreedom...
